scripts.build: pnpm --filter @poke-organizer/shared build && prisma generate && rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @poke-organizer/shared build && prisma generate && rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/main.js
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @poke-organizer/shared build && prisma generate && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @poke-organizer/shared build && prisma generate && vitest run
